revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Check_completeness_of_transclusions here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Check_completeness_of_transclusions for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {| class="wikitable" |- ! {{#if: {{{header|}}} | {{{header}}} | Transclusion maintenance }} |- | [https://templatetransclusioncheck.toolforge.org/?lang=en&name={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Check completeness of transclusions] |- {{#if: {{{update source|}}} | {{!}} [{{{update source}}} Update source] }} |- {{#if: {{{extra|}}} | {{!}} {{{extra}}} }} |}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
